body: Felix, good to connect — I've been meaning to reach out since the [Breakthrough Energy Ventures](orgs/breakthrough-energy-ventures) roundtable last month where I think we kept circling the same tables without actually talking. I'm working through a handful of seed deals right now that sit at the intersection of grid-edge AI and distributed storage, and I suspect our theses overlap more than they differ. Would love to compare notes, especially given what [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) is seeing in the Series A pipeline heading into Q2 — we're noticing some interesting compression in valuations on the infrastructure side that might create co-investment opportunities worth flagging to each other early. Are you free for a thirty-minute call sometime next week?
